overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves along wet reflective sidewalks past luxury retail displays, crosses a multi-lane street with moderate traffic, and explores an open commercial plaza surrounded by towering digital billboards and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury retail sidewalk with neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet tiled sidewalk, passing the Jinguji billboard and approaching distant pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera on the sidewalk ahead

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement for Jinguji clothing brand featuring a seated figure in white
modern glass building with cyan neon strip lighting along the edges
reflective tiled sidewalk with geometric white square patterns reflecting neon lights
tall futuristic buildings with extensive neon signage and vertical lighting strips
palm trees lining the street median in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet neon-lit sidewalk in a futuristic city at night. The camera moves forward past a prominent Jinguji billboard on the right, with reflective pavement showing geometric patterns. Tall buildings with extensive neon lighting rise ahead, and a few pedestrians are visible walking in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor seating plaza with palm trees and benches

events.description: turns left from the sidewalk into an outdoor seating area with palm trees and circular benches
steps onto the multi-lane street to cross as a black SUV passes by

agents.ego_description: turns toward a seating plaza, walks past people sitting on illuminated benches, then crosses the street

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a circular bench in the plaza area
black SUV driving past on the wet street

large digital billboard displaying 'Security You Can Trust' with a helmeted figure
wet asphalt street with multiple lanes and moving vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into an outdoor seating plaza with palm trees and illuminated benches where people are sitting. A large digital billboard advertising security services is visible across the street. The player then crosses the multi-lane road as a black SUV passes by, moving from the sidewalk into the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with moving traffic and large digital billboards

events.description: finishes crossing and walks along the street edge next to moving traffic and palm tree median

agents.ego_description: walking along the street curb beside moving traffic, passing large digital billboards and palm tree medians

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving away down the wet street with taillights glowing

entered.detail: large horizontal digital billboard advertising 'First 80GB' with an astronaut figure
grass median with palm trees dividing the road lanes
yellow and black striped curb barriers with illuminated edges

segments.scene_description: Walking along the edge of a multi-lane street with moderate traffic, the camera passes a large 'First 80GB' digital billboard on the right. Palm trees line the grassy median between road lanes, and vehicles including a red sports car drive past on the wet asphalt. The scene is illuminated by various neon advertisements on surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with towering digital advertisements

events.description: enters open pedestrian plaza with large vertical red billboards and holographic advertising kiosks

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, passing digital advertising kiosks and benches while observing the towering billboards

notable_agents.action: person walking across the plaza in the distance near the advertising screens

entered.detail: tall vertical digital billboard with red background displaying a figure in white clothing
futuristic advertising stands with holographic displays and illuminated edges
metal benches for pedestrians positioned near the advertising structures
tall building complex with multiple levels of shops, offices, and large digital screens

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a spacious open plaza surrounded by towering buildings covered in massive digital billboards. Vertical red advertisements and holographic kiosks dominate the space. The ground is paved with reflective tiles, and a few pedestrians are visible walking in the distance. The area is vehicle-free and designed for pedestrian commerce and advertising.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched futuristic city, moving from a narrow reflective sidewalk into a sprawling commercial plaza. It begins by gliding past a prominent Jinguji billboard on wet pavement, where the glow of towering buildings reflects off the ground. As the camera turns left, the scene shifts into an outdoor seating area with illuminated benches and palm trees before crossing a multi-lane road as a black SUV passes by. The movement continues along the edge of the street, passing a large digital advertisement and a red sports car navigating the wet asphalt. Finally, the camera enters a spacious, vehicle-free plaza dominated by massive vertical red advertisements and holographic kiosks that tower over the reflective tiled ground.
